summary: Hero right side is currently empty — the `hero-grid` is `1.48fr / 0.42fr` but the SVG anatomy field spans full bleed behind both columns via `position:absolute` (hero-globe). The figure is a generic standing outline (head + torso paths) with very low-opacity strokes. BrandMark uses a single vertical axis line with a gold gradient, a teal ring below, and a small circle above — abstract, not medical. No dedicated right-column focal asset exists; the anatomy SVG bleeds across the whole section as pure atmosphere.
recommendations: {"id":1,"title":"Replace generic figure with a single high-clarity torso cross-section (right column only)","detail":"Create a new `AnatomyFocalCard` component that renders an SVG chest cross-section (heart chambers, aorta arch, two lung outlines, rib cage) at ~340×480 viewBox, positioned as a true right-column element (not absolute). Use `.hero-anatomy-organ` stroke weight (~0.82) for primary structures, `.hero-anatomy-body-detail` (~0.68) for secondary lines. Add one amber dot annotation (rgba(194,154,86,0.88)) at the aortic root and one teal dot at the left hilum — matching BrandMark accent colors. This gives the hero a legible focal object that signals clinical depth without adding text clutter.","effort":"~60 min"}

{"id":2,"title":"Constrain the right column to a single card frame, not full-bleed SVG","detail":"Change `.hero-grid` to `1fr minmax(0,22rem)` and render the focal SVG inside a contained `\u003cdiv class=\u0027hero-focal-frame\u0027\u003e` with `border: 1px solid rgba(194,154,86,0.12)`, `border-radius: 1.5rem`, `background: radial-gradient(circle at 38% 28%, rgba(255,252,246,0.96), rgba(245,239,229,0.72))`, `overflow:hidden`. The ambient globe stays absolute for background atmosphere. This eliminates the empty-right-column problem without adding copy or extra components.","effort":"~15 min"}

{"id":3,"title":"Brand direction A — Editorial Medical (current direction, hardened)","detail":"Keep Source Serif 4 + warm parchment palette. Harden by: increasing `.hero-anatomy-body` stroke from 0.28 to 0.42 opacity, raising `hero-anatomy-organ` to 0.26, adding a single thin amber rule (`border-top: 1px solid rgba(194,154,86,0.22)`) under the eyebrow. BrandMark axis gets a 2px cap upgrade. Differentiator: feels like a premium clinical atlas. Best fit for CCRN ICU audience.","effort":"~20 min"}

{"id":4,"title":"Brand direction B — Dark Clinical (high contrast, night mode aesthetic)","detail":"Background: `#0e1012`. Primary text: `rgba(245,240,231,0.94)`. Accent: `rgba(194,154,86,1)` amber for callouts, `rgba(90,180,190,0.9)` teal for secondary. Anatomy strokes inverted: body at `rgba(220,210,195,0.32)`, organs at `rgba(194,154,86,0.44)`. BrandMark axis background becomes `#0e1012` with same gold gradient. Adds premium radiographic feel matching how ICU nurses actually read monitors in dim light. Hardest to implement but highest brand distinction. Effort ~90 min (new CSS layer + dark mode class).","effort":"~90 min"}

durable_memory: Hero right side has NO dedicated focal asset — SVG is full-bleed atmosphere only, not a column asset
hero-grid is 1.48fr/0.42fr with a tiny right column — needs widening to minmax(0,22rem) to hold a focal card
BrandMark uses gold axis gradient + teal ring + Source Serif 4 — these are the two brand accent colors
anatomy stroke weights: body=0.98px/0.28 opacity, organ=0.82px/0.14 opacity — too faint for premium read
Three viable brand directions: Editorial Medical (current hardened), Dark Clinical (high contrast), Precision Diagrammatic (line-art atlas)
active_context: Task: premium hero anatomy focal asset + 3 brand directions for creator outreach
Focal asset recommendation: chest cross-section SVG in right-column card frame
Brand direction C defined below in next_task

current_blocker: No right-column component exists — the hero-globe SVG is behind both columns. There is nothing to point a creator at as a 'right side focal asset' until AnatomyFocalCard is built.
suggested_human_fix: 1. Widen hero-grid right column to minmax(0,22rem). 2. Build AnatomyFocalCard.tsx with chest cross-section SVG (heart + lungs + ribs, 340×480 viewBox, amber + teal annotation dots). 3. Render it inside hero-focal-frame div in AmbientEditorialHero in place of the empty grid column. Est. 75 min total.
next_task: @{title=Brand direction C — Precision Diagrammatic; detail=Typeface: DM Mono or IBM Plex Mono for labels, Source Serif 4 retained for headings only. Anatomy strokes raised to 1.2px / 0.7 opacity — legible at a glance like a medical illustration handbook. BrandMark axis becomes a 2px amber line, no glow, no radial gradient on icon. Differentiator: looks like USMLE First Aid crossed with a design system. Strongest signal for a clinical educator or nurse creator who values rigor over warmth. Effort ~45 min (CSS overrides + font add).; effort=~45 min; action=Add brand direction C token layer in globals.css under `.theme-diagrammatic` scope.
